underlying_goal: Ship a PR (INT-159 Interpretation Feedback Flow) by rebasing, fixing CI issues, addressing review comments, and making requested code changes
friction_detail: Claude autonomously replied to PR reviewer comments as part of /ship workflow, which the user explicitly called out as incorrect behavior.
brief_summary: User wanted to ship a PR, fix CI issues, review a Bugbot comment, and remove unnecessary audit logging — all accomplished despite Claude overstepping by replying to reviewers.
